title: Login Issue Password Reset Failed
description: Tried resetting the password multiple times but every reset link shows expired immediately.

title: Payment Failed Mobile Banking
description: Tried to pay with bKash but the transaction was declined even though balance was sufficient.

title: Invoice Download Problem
description: Unable to download the January invoice from the billing section despite multiple attempts.

title: Billing Address Not Updating
description: Updated billing address still shows the old one in the system instead of the new details.

title: App Crash on Android 14
description: The app crashes immediately upon opening on Android 14 devices making it unusable.

title: Refund Not Received
description: Refund was requested three weeks ago but the amount has still not been transferred.

title: Two Factor Code Missing
description: OTP codes are not being received on the registered mobile number during login attempts.

title: Profile Picture Upload Failed
description: Tried uploading a new profile picture but the system keeps showing upload failed messages.

title: Auto Renewal Disabled
description: Tried enabling subscription auto renewal but the toggle remains inactive in the system.

title: Order Confirmation Email Missing
description: Payment was completed successfully but no confirmation email was received afterwards.

title: Delivery Tracking Not Updating
description: Parcel tracking information has not been updated for more than five consecutive days.

title: Password Reset Link Expired
description: Password reset link shows expired immediately after clicking and cannot be used.

title: Promo Code Not Working
description: Tried applying a promo code during checkout but the system marked it as invalid.

title: Push Notifications Delayed
description: Mobile app notifications are being delivered several hours late instead of instantly.

title: Duplicate Payment Charge
description: The same order was charged twice and a refund has been requested to resolve the issue.
